message:
test(fuzz): add FcpcFrameHeader encode/decode + layout fuzz target (resolves obk4f)

FcpcFrameHeader (fcpc.rs:89-152) is the 36-byte fixed-layout FCPC
header: magic [0..4) "FCPC" || version LE [4..6) || session_id [6..22)
|| seq LE [22..30) || flags LE [30..32) || len LE [32..36).

Existing fuzz_fcpc_frame tests decode panic-freedom; fcpc_seal_open
(4cka5) covers the AEAD layer. Header round-trip + per-byte-position
layout is covered transitively but not as a discrete MR. Parallel to
etzqz (SymbolRecord layout fuzz).

Five properties:
- encode → decode round-trip preserves all 5 fields
- layout binding via byte-position assertions per documented LE layout
- InvalidMagic on first-byte mutation (F→G)
- UnsupportedVersion on version=0x9999
- TooShort on bytes < FCPC_HEADER_LEN with correct (len, min)

Once-gated anchor: known header (session_id=0x11×16, seq=0x0807...0201,
flags=ENCRYPTED, len=0x1213_1415) verified byte-for-byte at each
documented position + decode round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -801,5 +801,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_fcpc_header_layout"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fcpc_header_layout.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
